name: Lipetsk Oblast (Russia)

colors.symbolism: the field, recalling Russia's historical state colour and the courage of Lipetsk's people
the gold of the linden tree, central charge of the Lipetsk arms
the hills of the upland forest-steppe of Lipetsk Oblast

description: A red field charged in the centre with a stylised yellow linden tree rising above a band of stylised green hills.
history: Adopted on 10 July 2003 by the Lipetsk Oblast Council of Deputies; the device replicates the central element of the Lipetsk coat of arms granted in 1781 to the city, with the linden tree as the canting symbol of Lipetsk.

features.symbolism: A red field charged with the heraldic device of the oblast: a stylised yellow linden tree above a green hill outline
the linden tree, after which the city of Lipetsk is named (lipa = linden in Russian); a centuries-old emblem of the city and oblast
the rolling hills of the Central Russian Upland on which Lipetsk lies
